title: PackUK: operational plan 2024 to 2025
body: "This is Pack UK’s operational plan for the year 2024 to 2025.  PackUK has an obligation to publish this plan under the Producer Responsibility Obligations (Packaging and Packaging Waste) Regulations 2024.  The joint policy statement on extended producer responsibility for packaging provides additional details on what the four nations expect to be covered in this operational plan. "
